response.justification: Bogdan's resume demonstrates strong experience in full-stack and backend development, particularly with Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, but lacks the core C++ and STL expertise required for the Senior Manager — Digital Solutions role. His background in industrial automation, cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), and cloud platform solutions is minimal or absent, which are critical for this position. While he has leadership and architectural experience, it is not aligned with the specific technical competencies or security practices outlined in the job description.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and backend development experience (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang)
Strong leadership and mentorship background (Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq, Founder at GISCollective)
Experience with real-time systems, performance optimization, and scalable architectures
concerns: Limited or no direct experience with C++, STL, or object-oriented programming in C++
No demonstrated expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1) or secure development lifecycle (SDL)
Lack of exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure) or industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA)

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform and industrial automation exposure
